description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a mix of black and light wood exterior finishes. The structure features large, rectangular windows arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, providing ample natural light. The property includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, patio furniture, and a privacy fence, as well as a driveway and garage at the front. The landscaping is well-maintained, with green lawns, shrubs, and several trees lining the perimeter. The main entryway is accessible via a short set of steps and is accentuated by a minimalist pathway and a small porch area. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roof, large windows, wood and black exterior, and a landscaped yard with a pool and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, garage, and landscaped yard with trees and pathway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood-paneled facade, symmetrical window arrangement, and tree-lined street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, privacy fence, and garage access.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the black exterior, pool area, and patio furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with short steps, small porch, and a clean pathway, no decorative columns or overhangs.
